name: Hydro Jetting
metaDescription: Professional hydro jetting in Metro Detroit. Detroit Sewer Co. clears grease, debris and blockages up to 350 ft. Available 24/7. Text 734-556-2035.
h1: Hydro Jetting for Sewer & Storm Drains in Metro Detroit
intro: When slow drains or recurring backups keep coming back no matter how many times you snake the line, the real culprit is usually years of accumulated grease, scale, and debris coating the inside of the pipe. Hydro jetting is the only cleaning method powerful enough to fully restore pipe capacity, and Detroit Sewer Co. brings commercial-grade hydro jetting equipment to residential and commercial jobs across Metro Detroit.
bodyParagraphs: Our hydro jetting system delivers water at extremely high pressure, cutting through grease layers, flushing sediment, and scouring pipe walls clean from the inside out. We can reach blockages up to 350 feet through multiple manholes, making the service ideal for long commercial runs, storm sewer mains, and residential laterals that traditional equipment cannot fully clear.

Signs that you need hydro jetting include drains that slow down shortly after conventional cleaning, gurgling sounds from multiple fixtures at once, foul odors even after a basic snaking, and recurring backups in commercial kitchens or laundry facilities. If you manage an apartment complex, restaurant, or retail center, periodic scheduled hydro jetting prevents costly emergency situations.

Detroit Sewer Co. serves residential homeowners, property managers, and commercial facilities throughout Detroit, Dearborn, Livonia, Warren, Troy, Southfield, and the surrounding Metro Detroit region. Every hydro jetting job starts with a thorough assessment and ends with a clear pipe and a straight-forward explanation of what we found. Text us 24/7 at 734-556-2035 to schedule service or get an immediate response to an emergency.
bullets: Clears grease, scale, roots, and debris in a single pass
Reaches up to 350 feet through multiple access points
Ideal for residential laterals, commercial kitchens, and storm drains
Available for emergency and scheduled maintenance calls
schemaDescription: High-pressure hydro jetting service for residential and commercial sewer and storm drain lines in Metro Detroit, Michigan.

name: Root Removal
metaDescription: Tree roots destroying your sewer line? Detroit Sewer Co. removes roots from sewer pipes across Metro Detroit. Text 734-556-2035 for 24/7 service.
h1: Sewer Root Removal in Metro Detroit
intro: Tree roots are the single most destructive force acting on residential sewer laterals across Metro Detroit. As clay and cast-iron pipes age, their joints crack and separate, creating entry points that roots seek out instinctively. Once inside, roots grow rapidly, eventually filling the pipe completely and causing repeated backups that get worse with every season. Detroit Sewer Co. has the equipment and experience to remove roots thoroughly and restore full flow to your sewer line.
bodyParagraphs: We use the Warthog WT Classic and complementary cutting heads specifically engineered to remove roots from sewer pipes without damaging the host pipe. Unlike basic cable snaking that simply punches a temporary hole through a root mass, our process cuts roots flush with the pipe wall and clears the full diameter of the line. Combined with hydro jetting, root removal leaves your pipe as open as the day it was installed.

Warning signs of root intrusion include slow drains that do not respond normally to snaking, gurgling toilets when other fixtures are used, foul odors from floor drains, and backups that recur within weeks of a conventional cleaning. If you have mature trees in your yard or in the city parkway strip, and your home was built before 1980, your lateral line very likely has some degree of root intrusion.

After root removal, we recommend a video camera inspection to document the condition of the pipe and identify any sections where root entry points have caused joint separation or cracking. This gives you an honest picture of your sewer's remaining service life and helps you make informed decisions before a full backup or collapse occurs. Text Detroit Sewer Co. 24/7 at 734-556-2035 to schedule root removal or get an emergency response.
bullets: Mechanical cutting removes roots at the pipe wall
Combined with hydro jetting for full pipe clearing
Effective on clay, cast-iron, and older PVC lines
Camera inspection available to document pipe condition after treatment
schemaDescription: Professional sewer root removal service for residential and commercial sewer lines throughout Metro Detroit and Southeast Michigan.

name: Sewer Backup & Emergency Service
metaDescription: Sewer backed up in Metro Detroit? Detroit Sewer Co. responds 24/7 to residential and commercial sewer emergencies. Text 734-556-2035 for immediate help.
h1: Emergency Sewer Backup Clearing in Metro Detroit
intro: A sewer backup is one of the most stressful plumbing emergencies a homeowner or property manager can face. Raw sewage backing up into a basement, laundry room, or floor drain creates health hazards, property damage, and serious disruption to daily life. Detroit Sewer Co. responds to sewer backup emergencies 24 hours a day, 7 days a week across Metro Detroit, with the heavy-duty equipment needed to clear the blockage fast and identify what caused it.
bodyParagraphs: When we arrive at a backup call, our first priority is diagnosing the source: is it a root mass in the lateral, a grease accumulation in the main, a collapsed pipe section, or a problem in the city sewer main? We use high-capacity jetting equipment and, when needed, our video camera to locate the blockage precisely before we start clearing. This prevents unnecessary work and gets you an accurate answer about what happened and what comes next.

We have cleared severe backups in some of the toughest conditions Metro Detroit sewer systems can produce: 1,800-foot commercial sewer runs serving warehouses and plazas, residential laterals packed solid with roots, and multi-unit apartment buildings where a single trunk line failure affects dozens of units simultaneously. When the problem turns out to involve city infrastructure rather than your private line, we provide detailed documentation to support your service request with the municipality.

Text Detroit Sewer Co. 24/7 at 734-556-2035. We prioritize emergency backup calls and will give you a realistic arrival time immediately. Serving Detroit, Dearborn, Livonia, Warren, Southfield, Royal Oak, Troy, and all of Metro Detroit. Do not wait on a sewer backup: the longer wastewater sits, the greater the risk of damage and contamination to your property.
bullets: 24/7 emergency response throughout Metro Detroit
High-capacity jetting equipment on every service truck
Camera inspection available to locate root cause
Documentation provided when city main involvement is suspected
schemaDescription: 24/7 emergency sewer backup clearing and restoration service for residential and commercial properties across Metro Detroit, Michigan.

name: Storm Drain & Culvert Cleaning
metaDescription: Storm drain and culvert cleaning for commercial and municipal Metro Detroit properties. Detroit Sewer Co. keeps drainage flowing. Text 734-556-2035.
h1: Storm Drain & Culvert Cleaning in Metro Detroit
intro: Storm drain systems are easy to overlook until a heavy rain turns a parking lot into a pond or a culvert backs up and floods adjacent property. Detroit Sewer Co. specializes in high-volume storm drain and culvert cleaning for commercial properties, industrial sites, apartment complexes, and municipal infrastructure throughout Metro Detroit. Keeping storm drains clear is not just a convenience issue; in many jurisdictions it is a code compliance requirement.
bodyParagraphs: Over time, storm drains collect sediment, debris, leaves, gravel, and in commercial areas, significant grease and oil from parking lots and vehicle traffic. This buildup reduces drainage capacity progressively, and the first sign of a problem is often standing water after rain events that previously drained quickly. Our hydro jetting equipment is scaled for storm drain and culvert work, capable of flushing large-diameter pipes and reaching deep into culvert systems that conventional equipment cannot access.

We provide storm drain cleaning services for retail shopping centers, office parks, apartment complexes, industrial warehouses, and roadway culverts throughout the Metro Detroit area. Scheduled annual or seasonal cleaning prevents emergency situations and keeps your property compliant with local stormwater management requirements. We also respond to emergency storm drain backups when sudden flooding creates immediate risk to property or access.

If you manage a commercial property in Detroit, Dearborn, Warren, Southfield, Troy, Sterling Heights, or anywhere in the region and you have not had your storm drains professionally cleaned recently, now is the right time. Text Detroit Sewer Co. at 734-556-2035 to discuss your property's needs and schedule a service visit.
bullets: High-volume hydro jetting sized for storm drain and culvert work
Removes sediment, debris, grease, and standing blockages
Serves commercial, industrial, and residential properties
Scheduled maintenance and emergency response available
schemaDescription: Commercial and municipal storm drain and culvert cleaning service using high-capacity hydro jetting equipment throughout Metro Detroit.

name: Video Camera Inspection
metaDescription: Video camera sewer inspections in Metro Detroit. See inside your line before spending money on repairs. Detroit Sewer Co. 734-556-2035.
h1: Video Camera Sewer Inspection in Metro Detroit
intro: Guessing at what is happening inside a sewer line is expensive and often wrong. Detroit Sewer Co. provides video camera sewer inspections that give you a direct, real-time view of the inside of your pipe: exactly where the blockage or damage is, what caused it, and how serious the condition is. It is the most efficient diagnostic tool available for sewer problems, and it prevents property owners from paying for unnecessary excavation or repair work based on assumptions.
bodyParagraphs: We run a flexible, high-resolution camera through the sewer line from a cleanout or access point and record the entire run as we go. You get a clear picture of root intrusion, grease accumulation, joint separation, pipe cracking, belly sections where the line has settled and collects debris, and any other conditions affecting your sewer's performance. For real estate transactions, a sewer camera inspection is one of the most valuable pre-purchase checks a buyer can make.

Camera inspection is also valuable after root removal or hydro jetting to confirm that the line is fully clear and to document the condition of the pipe wall after cleaning. If we find sections of pipe that have cracked joints or root entry points, we can give you an honest assessment of the pipe's remaining service life and what maintenance or repair steps make sense given what we found.

Common situations where we recommend camera inspection include: repeated backups after conventional cleaning, homes built before 1985 with no known lateral service history, pre-purchase inspections for real estate buyers, and any time a sewer repair estimate seems unclear about what specifically needs to be done. Text Detroit Sewer Co. 24/7 at 734-556-2035 to schedule your inspection across Metro Detroit.
bullets: Real-time high-resolution camera inspection of sewer laterals
Identifies roots, cracks, joint separation, grease, and belly sections
Ideal for pre-purchase inspections and post-cleaning verification
Precise location of problems prevents unnecessary digging
schemaDescription: Professional video camera sewer line inspection service for residential and commercial properties throughout Metro Detroit and Southeast Michigan.
